emotional_tone: Premium, clean, culturally rich, trustworthy, abundant

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Bento' Protocol for category grids and Asymmetric Tetris layout for about section. Cardless products with images directly sitting on the surface with subtle rounded corners.

navigation.style: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 border-b border-[#1B4332]/10

buttons.primary: bg-[#1B4332] text-white hover:bg-[#1B4332]/90 rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#128C7E] flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-md
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1B4332] text-[#1B4332] hover:bg-[#1B4332] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all

cards.product: bg-transparent border-none. Image: max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none object-cover rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow. Text content aligned left with generous padding p-4.

hero.description: Wide-angle cinematic photograph of lush green tea gardens in Assam at golden hour sunrise

products.name: Assam Tea
products.description: Elegant display of dried tea leaves in a ceramic bowl

products.name: Organic Honey
products.description: Close-up of golden honey in a jar showcasing its rich amber hue

products.name: Traditional Assamese Dress
products.description: Traditional Assamese silk Mekhela Sador fabric

products.name: Joha Rice
products.description: Premium aromatic short-grain white rice in a bowl

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts from Google Fonts.

Implement the 'Order via WhatsApp' flow everywhere instead of typical 'Add to Cart'. The link should be formatted as `https://wa.me/<number>?text=I'm%20interested%20in%20[Product Name]`. Use a placeholder number like 1234567890 if not provided.
Ensure all product cards are cardless and minimal, relying on high-quality imagery.
Use Lenis for smooth scrolling if applicable.
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-order-button').
Create pages: Homepage, Product Catalog, About Us, Contact. Route between them using React Router.
Ensure navigation bar is fixed, using glassmorphism styling provided.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout composition, no heavy pre-built structural components unless it's an interactive element like a dialog or form from Shadcn.
Avoid using teal or purple colors.
The hero section should have 'Authentic Products from the Heart of Assam' as the main headline.
